author: y4rr
content: Reprioritized after dispatch path audit. GPU backward kernels (#462-#468) are the real training bottleneck — relu/sigmoid/tanh/gelu/softmax/layernorm/sum_axis all do GPU→CPU→GPU roundtrips during backward pass. Demoted CPU matmul (#415) and CPU SIMD (#416) from critical to high since they only affect CPU-resident tensors and don't cause the passthrough anti-pattern.
